description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern, minimalist design, upholstered in a dark gray fabric. The sofa features three main seating sections along the longer side and a shorter perpendicular section forming a right angle, creating a corner lounge area. The seat and back cushions are uniform in size, with each seat having its own individual cushion, and the back cushions are slightly taller than the armrests, providing ample support. The armrests are present only at the ends of the L-shape, with a straight, blocky profile and no visible decorative elements. The sofa stands on six sturdy, block-style legs, evenly spaced at the corners and at the intersection of the L-shape, all finished in a matching dark tone. The upholstery appears to be a tightly woven fabric with a subtle, matte texture, giving the sofa a contemporary and versatile look suitable for urban environments.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa in dark gray fabric with straight armrests, block legs, and uniform seat and back cushions. The upholstery is matte and tightly woven, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, all seat and back cushions, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous line of back cushions and the block legs along the length.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the corner configuration and the arrangement of cushions at the intersection.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four individual seat cushions and four matching back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout; cushions appear attached or semi-attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, block-style armrests present only at the ends of the L-shape, matching the height of the seat cushions and lacking decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Six block-style legs, positioned at the corners and at the L-shape intersection, with a solid, exposed design and a dark finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, medium-height backrest with four segmented, uniform back cushions, continuous along both sections of the L-shape.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle, tightly woven texture and a matte finish, no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
